name: Stir Fried Chinese Chicken with Cashews
recipeIngredient: Chicken breasts (1.5 lb), boned and cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg white in a small bowl.
2. Add 1 tablespoon soy sauce and 1 tablespoon cornstarch, mix well.
3. Add chicken and toss thoroughly; let stand for 15 minutes.
4. Combine 1/4 cup soy sauce, 1 teaspoon cornstarch, sherry, cider vinegar, and sugar in a small bowl. Mix very well and set aside.
5. Heat oil in a wok and add cashews. Stir-fry for about 1 minute; remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
6. Discard 1/3 the oil.
7. Add ginger, scallions, and water chestnuts to the wok. Stir-fry for 1 minute.
8. Add chicken cubes, green peppers, and sauce. Cook, stirring constantly, until thickened.
9. Return cashews to the wok.
10. Serve over hot cooked rice.
